description: Abstract parent for the four discrepancy classes (Multi-Source, Drift, Confidence, Constraint). First-class divergence entity (Pillar 1 — Multi-Truth). Created by the central discrepancy-engine, never edge-sourced — therefore no delivery/scope/promotion wire-contract. Carries the v7 lifecycle: open -> resolved | accepted_known_divergence | escalated | superseded (Concept §17.2). next/ pilot: adds 'constraint' as 4th discrepancy_class — raised when an edge constraint-detector observes a violation of a profile 'constraints' rule (next/validation/constraint-schema.json) and publishes discrepancy.<site>.<machine>.constraint.<constraint_id>. Requires the coordinated 'constraint' class in services/discrepancy-engine/src/types.ts (i3x-v4).

attributes.name: discrepancy_class
attributes.description: Which detector class produced it (§17.1; 'constraint' = edge constraint-detector, next/ pilot; 'control_limit' = two-tier control-band breach (Warngrenze (warning limit)/Eingriffsgrenze (action limit), op within_limits) with a raise/clear (auto-clear) lifecycle, surfaced on the dedicated OT/IT alarm panels rather than the steward work-off queue)

attributes.name: resolution_mode
attributes.description: Closure mode once terminal; null while open

attributes.name: resolution_note
attributes.description: Steward rationale for the closure decision

attributes.name: steward_domain
attributes.description: Owning steward domain — domain-separation enforced for MVP (§16)

attributes.name: assigned_to
attributes.description: Person/role the discrepancy is assigned to

attributes.name: business_impact
attributes.description: Estimated business impact for steward prioritization (§17.4)

attributes.name: recurrence_key
attributes.description: Stable signature for pattern-mining of repeated discrepancies — feeds auto-resolve-rule suggestion (§17.3 path 1). For class 'constraint': <machine_id>:<constraint_id>

attributes.name: detected_at
attributes.description: When the detector first raised it

attributes.name: resolved_at
attributes.description: When it reached a terminal state

attributes.name: audit_ref
attributes.description: Hash-chain ref into the vault (vault-hashchain) for the resolution event

relationships.description: Newer discrepancy that overtook this one (§17.2 superseded)
Auto-resolve rule that closed it, if any (§17.3 path 1)
